meta.design: 40-call session, five mode, real npx fs+memory backends, real MiniLM need vectors, file SQLite. Mix: 25 well-phrased (needs.mjs phrasings) / 7 vague / 2 wrong-args-then-corrected pairs (4 calls) / 4 genuine failures (3 bad-args + 1 blocking-IO timeout that doubles as the Sixth Man probe). Deviation from serve.ts: embedder pre-warmed deterministically (serve warms it lazily in background); same warmup code path otherwise (ensureEmbeddingModel + document-kind backfill).
